title: Allied plans for German industry after World War II
body: In the aftermath of World War II, the victorious Allies of World War II developed industrial plans for Germany which would be imposed to reduce and manage Germany's industrial capacity.
categories: Aftermath of World War II in Germany
Articles with specifically marked weasel-worded phrases from January 2018
Articles with unsourced statements from November 2021
